summary: A Forbes billionaire profile of Lynda Resnick, co-founder of The Wonderful Company. The source provides biographical details, net worth, and a list of related news articles, but contains almost no direct insights into her thought process, frameworks, or business philosophy.

signature_quotes.text: It takes a nut to sell a nut.
signature_quotes.context: Featured in the 'In Their Own Words' section of her Forbes profile.
